name: Spaghetti with Bacon & Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until lightly crisp. Drain and reserve 2 tablespoons drippings.
2. Coarsely chop the bacon and set aside on the side.
3. Melt butter in the bacon drippings, add white wine and pepper. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
5. Add bacon to the butter-wine mixture.
6. Quickly incorporate the beaten eggs from the heat of the pasta (about 1 minute).
7. Drain the cooked pasta well.
8. Toss the pasta with the bacon sauce and beaten eggs.
9. Mix in half the grated cheese. Serve with extra cheese on the side for topping.
10. For a lower-fat option, Eggbeaters can be substituted for the eggs.
